capabilities.referenceCapability: Search, batch search, engines, and pagination

verification.gate: bun run check:compat && bun run check:adapters
verification.scenario: Invoke canonical search, then prove equivalent Bright Data envelope shapes preserve the same result while credentials remain header-only.
Read two URLs as ordered Markdown and verify complete-page resources, rejection of obsolete modes, and private-network rejection.

verification.gate: bun run check:compat && bun run check:coverage
verification.scenario: Reject format modes so read_web has one deterministic result contract.

capabilities.exclusionReason: Raw markup adds a second result mode to the common agent-reading path without improving its web-data outcome.
capabilities.userConsequence: The base read tool returns readable Markdown rather than exact page markup.

verification.gate: bun run check:adapters && bun run check:compat
verification.scenario: Run one sourced Deep Lookup research objective with preview and explicit full-run cost gates.

capabilities.referenceCapability: Ad hoc field extraction from a known page

verification.gate: bun run check:compat && bun run evals
verification.scenario: Extract named fields from known URLs through the structured Deep Lookup backend; use run_dataset when a maintained extractor exists.
Discover the representative executable contract, then collect known records in requested order.

capabilities.referenceCapability: Dataset fields and filtered record search

verification.scenario: Discover the typed search schema and execute a filtered canonical result.

capabilities.referenceCapability: Caller-scoped Marketplace catalog and field metadata

verification.scenario: Search the caller's live dataset list, fetch active field metadata, merge known collection schemas into the same dataset IDs, and route record search through synchronous or filtered snapshot paths.

capabilities.referenceCapability: Natural-language objective to sourced structured table

verification.scenario: Return a Deep Lookup preview by default, reject a full run below its computed cost cap before triggering, then complete an acknowledged full run.

verification.gate: bun run check:compat && bun run check:adapters
verification.scenario: Run the same logical dataset call synchronously and through an optional MCP task; the Bright adapter separately proves trigger, polling, download, timeout, and cancellation while upstream job IDs remain private.
Read a result and continuation page lazily from bounded local rows or an upstream snapshot part, then prove another authenticated principal cannot read the artifact.

verification.gate: bun run build && bun run check:compat
verification.scenario: Resolve the table app resource while preserving the canonical structured result and text fallback.

capabilities.referenceCapability: Browser navigation, history, observation, and typed actions

verification.gate: bun run check:compat && bun run check:browser
verification.scenario: Navigate, observe, interact, use history, and close through MCP; separately prove principal and artifact ownership, expiry, cancellation cleanup, idempotent close, and credential/CDP redaction.
List exactly six tools in all, two in web, two in deep-lookup, two in marketplace, and four in browser.
Request IDs, attempts, durations, terminal states, and bounded session lifecycle stay operational rather than model-visible.

verification.gate: bun run scripts/brightdata-connection.ts help && bun run check:adapters && bun run check:compat
verification.scenario: Local setup uses Keychain or explicit injection; hosted requests use the caller's Bearer key, bind state to its digest, auto-create missing product zones, and reject cross-principal sessions.
Keep guidance outside the model-visible server surface.

capabilities.exclusionReason: Guidance prompts are not Bright Data service capabilities and are optional in V1.
capabilities.userConsequence: The server does not offer prewritten strategy prompts; agents compose the typed tools directly.
